name: LicenseCapabilities
summary: Controls the buttons that will appear on the license notification window that is displayed if a license for the requesting product is not found. Note, the "Close" button will always be displayed.

enum_values.name: NoCapabilities
enum_values.summary: Only the "Close" button will be displayed

enum_values.name: CanBeSpecified
enum_values.summary: OBSOLETE: Shows ""Enter a license" and "Use a Zoo" buttons. Use SupportsStandalone | SupportsZoo instead.

enum_values.name: SupportsRhinoAccounts
enum_values.summary: Supports getting a license from a Cloud Zoo / Rhino Account

enum_values.name: SupportsZooPerUser
enum_values.summary: Supports getting a license from a Zoo server

enum_values.name: SupportsZooPerCore
enum_values.summary: Supports getting a license from a Zoo server
